nodes.name: Schedule Trigger
nodes.notes: Runs every Monday at 9 AM. Modify for monthly reports.

parameters.jsCode:
// Generate HTML report const data = $input.first().json.report_data; const typeDistribution = Object.entries(data.runs_by_type) .map(([type, count]) => `${type}${count}`) .join(''); const statusDistribution = Object.entries(data.runs_by_status) .map(([status, count]) => `${status}${count}`) .join(''); const topModelsList = data.top_models .map((m, i) => `${i + 1}${m.name}${m.count} runs`) .join(''); const perfMetricsList = data.performance_metrics .map(m => `${m.name}${m.mean}${m.unit}${m.min} - ${m.max}`) .join(''); const html = `

📊 ${data.title}

Generated: ${new Date(data.generated_at).toLocaleDateString('en-US', { weekday: 'long', year: 'numeric', month: 'long', day: 'numeric', hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit' })}

Executive Summary

${data.summary.total_runs}
Total Runs
${data.summary.success_rate}
Success Rate
${data.summary.completed_runs}
Completed
${Math.round(data.summary.average_duration_seconds / 60)}m
Avg Duration
${data.summary.total_models}
Models Tested
${data.summary.unique_checkpoints}
Unique Builds

Runs by Type

${typeDistribution || ''}
Evaluation TypeCount
No data available

Success/Failure Distribution

${statusDistribution || ''}
StatusCount
No data available

Top Models

${topModelsList || ''}
#Model NameActivity
No data available

Performance Metrics Summary

${perfMetricsList || ''}
MetricAverageUnitRange
No performance data available

Access Full Report

View interactive dashboard for detailed analytics, trend charts, and model comparisons.

Lemonade Eval Dashboard | Automated Report Generation

For questions, contact: team@lemonade.ai

`; return { json: { html, text: `${data.title} - ${data.summary.total_runs} runs, ${data.summary.success_rate} success rate` } };
